meaning: n.移民出境,侨居,[总称]移民
examples: Emigration to the West reached a peak in the 1830's.
Was it emigration to a Jewish state in Palestine?
Fujian and Zhejiang have been encouraging emigration to Africa as a source of remittances and of new jobs.
After all, emigration leaves them with fewer workers to pay for supporting the elderly.
It thinks emigration will boost the Polish economy because many will not live in Germany permanently.
